commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Concerning Edom, thus says the LORD of hosts; Is wisdom no more in Teman. has counsel perished from the prudent. has their wisdom vanished. This nation was involved in the common ruin, for its barbarity towards God's people, Abdias x. , Psalm cxxxvi. , and Ezechiel xxv. Theman, renowned formerly for wisdom, Job ii. Yet at the approach of danger, all were confounded. (Calmet) They were only worldly wise. (Worthington).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
